venues.name: Wankhede Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Good batting surface, pace and bounce. Dew factor in evening matches.

venues.name: M.A. Chidambaram Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Spin-friendly surface. Lower scores typical. Slow outfield.

venues.name: M. Chinnaswamy Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Flat pitch, short boundaries. High-scoring venue. Batting paradise.

venues.name: Eden Gardens
venues.pitchNotes: Good all-round surface. Slight help for pacers early. Dew a factor.

venues.name: Rajiv Gandhi International Cricket Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Batting-friendly. Good pace and bounce. Big ground reduces sixes slightly.

venues.name: Arun Jaitley Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Good batting surface. Even bounce. Slightly larger boundaries.

venues.name: Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Good batting track. Shorter boundaries on one side. Pace-friendly early.

venues.name: Sawai Mansingh Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Produces high scores. Flat pitch, short square boundaries.

venues.name: Narendra Modi Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Large ground, reduces sixes. Good batting track. Low dew.

venues.name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
venues.pitchNotes: Good batting surface. Short straight boundaries. Pace and bounce.
